# 参考链接

文档 [https://www.cobo.com/products/agentic-wallet/manual/start-here/introduction](https://www.cobo.com/products/agentic-wallet/manual/start-here/introduction) 

* [CLI 文档](https://www.cobo.com/products/agentic-wallet/manual/reference/cli%20)   
* [Pact  Policy 说明](https://www.cobo.com/products/agentic-wallet/manual/reference/pact-policies)  
* [API 文档](https://www.cobo.com/products/agentic-wallet/manual/reference/overview)  
* （部分内容可能过时，以实际产品为准）

CAW binary [https://download.agenticwallet.cobo.com/binary-release](https://download.agenticwallet.cobo.com/binary-release)  
Cobo TSS Node binary [https://download.tss.cobo.com/binary-release/latest](https://download.tss.cobo.com/binary-release/latest)  
Python SDK [https://github.com/CoboGlobal/cobo-agentic-wallet-python-sdk](https://github.com/CoboGlobal/cobo-agentic-wallet-python-sdk)   
TypeScript SDK [https://github.com/CoboGlobal/cobo-agentic-wallet-typescript-sdk](https://github.com/CoboGlobal/cobo-agentic-wallet-typescript-sdk)

正式环境

* 官网 [https://agenticwallet.cobo.com/agentic-wallet](https://agenticwallet.cobo.com/agentic-wallet)  
* API [https://api-core.agenticwallet.cobo.com/](https://api-core.agenticwallet.cobo.com/)  
* Skills [https://github.com/CoboGlobal/cobo-agentic-wallet/](https://github.com/CoboGlobal/cobo-agentic-wallet/)  
* App   
  * Apple App Store [https://apps.apple.com/app/id6761912352](https://apps.apple.com/app/id6761912352)  
  * Google Play [https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.cobo.agenticwallet](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.cobo.agenticwallet)

开发者环境

* 官网 [https://agenticwallet.dev.cobo.com/agentic-wallet](https://agenticwallet.dev.cobo.com/agentic-wallet) （与正式环境 skill 链接不同）  
* API [https://api-core.agenticwallet.dev.cobo.com/api/v1/docs](https://api-core.agenticwallet.dev.cobo.com/api/v1/docs) （有 Open API docs）  
* Skills [https://github.com/cobosteven/cobo-agentic-wallet-dev](https://github.com/cobosteven/cobo-agentic-wallet-dev)   
* Apple Testflight [https://testflight.apple.com/join/Gs397pnJ](https://testflight.apple.com/join/Gs397pnJ) （支持 mock 登录）

（注：以下内容均使用开发者环境演示）

# CAW 整体架构

# ![][image1]

# Agent

本节介绍如何将 CAW 接入 AI Agent 中使用。

## Skills

打开官网首页 [https://agenticwallet.dev.cobo.com/agentic-wallet](https://agenticwallet.dev.cobo.com/agentic-wallet)  
可复制 prompt

```
Install the skill via npx skills:
npx skills add cobosteven/cobo-agentic-wallet-dev --skill cobo-agentic-wallet-dev --yes --global

Follow the skill instructions to create a wallet for the user.
```

将其运行在你的 Agent 中（Codex, Claude Code, Open Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Hermes … )

上面的 prompt 首先会安装 skills，并运行 skills 中的脚本完成 caw cli 的安装。

默认情况下 Agent 会帮你创建一个钱包，如果没有自动创建，可以指示 Agent 创建钱包

```
帮我创建一个钱包。
```

创建完成后，Agent 就获得了一个可以自由操作的钱包，可以自由的运行转账、合约调用、消息签名等。

如果希望进一步进行人类监管，需要配合 CAW App 使用，完成钱包的配对。

下载完 App 之后，指示 Agent

```
帮我完成 App 的配对
```

从这里下载测试版 App [https://testflight.apple.com/join/Gs397pnJ](https://testflight.apple.com/join/Gs397pnJ)   
测试版 App 支持 Mock 登录，可以输入任意字符串完成登录，后台会为该字符串创建独立的账户（不需要使用真实的邮箱或者社交账户）。注意 mock 登录意味着任何知道该字符串的人都可以完成登录，不建议在测试版 App 中充值大额真实资产，避免产生损失。

![][image2]![][image3]  
此时 Agent 会生成一个 8 位数字的配对码。在 App 中输入之后等待 MPC 交互完成后即可完成配对。注意要备份好钱包文件，如果丢失无法恢复，可能产生资产损失。  
![][image4]![][image5]![][image6]![][image7]

完成配对之后，Agent 发起交易前必须提交 Pact，通过人类审批通过后，Agent 可以在 Pact 规则限制内自由发起交易。Pact 在 App 上展示效果如下：  
![][image8]

配对完成后手机可以直接完成转账。

## MCP

参考这里 [https://www.cobo.com/products/agentic-wallet/manual/developer/mcp](https://www.cobo.com/products/agentic-wallet/manual/developer/mcp) 可以完成 MCP Server 的配置。以 MCP Server 形式给 AI Agent 使用。  
但默认还是推荐 Skills 的形式，功能更强大。

# Developer

本节介绍更底层的 CLI 与 API 的用法。

## CLI

注：CLI 的用法可以阅读文档或者 Skills 中的描述，或者直接参考 Agent 的操作流程。

运行 Skills 中的安装脚本即可完成 caw cli 和 cobo tss node cli 的安装  
[https://github.com/cobosteven/cobo-agentic-wallet-dev/blob/master/skills/cobo-agentic-wallet/scripts/bootstrap-env.sh](https://github.com/cobosteven/cobo-agentic-wallet-dev/blob/master/skills/cobo-agentic-wallet/scripts/bootstrap-env.sh) 

命令安装在本地的 `~/.cobo-agentic-wallet/` 目录下。目录树内容如下：

```
$ tree  ~/.cobo-agentic-wallet
~/.cobo-agentic-wallet
├── bin
│   ├── caw   # CAW 主执行程序
│   └── caw.meta
├── cache
├── config        # 配置文件，指定 default_profile
├── logs          # 日志
├── onboard-drafts
├── profiles
│   ├── profile_caw_agent_045b7a902c05ed6d # 具体 Agent 配置
│   │   ├── credentials
│   │   └── tss-node
│   │       ├── cobo-tss-node
│   │       ├── configs
│   │       │   ├── cobo-tss-node-config.yaml
│   │       │   └── cobo-tss-node-config.yaml.template
│   │       ├── db
│   │       │   └── secrets.db
│   │       ├── logs
│   │       │   ├── cobo-tss-node-coboTzSW3S8L1s3MfchJpVVieCDuEfYtim9n7zLL5y37zD3at.log
│   │       │   └── tss-node.log
│   │       └── recovery
│   ├── profile_caw_agent_05341883d9dccc92  # 其他 Agent 配置。
│   │   ├── ... 
├── telemetry_config.json
└── telemetry.jsonl
```

运行 `caw onboard` 会创建一个新的钱包。dev 环境下使用

```
~/.cobo-agentic-wallet/bin/caw onboard --env dev

{
  "agent_id": "caw_agent_8eb329a19a120ca2",
  ...
  "session_id": "sess-f490dd4dbd3c18ed",
  "wallet_status": "bootstrapping"
}
```

通过 session\_id 查看 onboard 进度，如果展示钱包状态为 active 说明创建完成。

```
 ~/.cobo-agentic-wallet/bin/caw onboard --session-id sess-f490dd4dbd3c18ed
{
  "agent_id": "caw_agent_8eb329a19a120ca2",
  "bootstrap_stage": "wallet_active",
  "default_addresses": [
    {
      "address": "0x9a10fefe078267ea2dd32f2853f9a97d34100b6f",
      "chain_identifier": "ETH"
    },
    {
      "address": "A8tEv62vQv9XSZZoH6sjRmGtMc1m8uBxqyNZKiVB2rFM",
      "chain_identifier": "SOL"
    }
  ],
  "needs_input": false,
  "next_action": "Onboarding complete. Wallet is active and ready to use.",
  "phase": "wallet_active",
  "prompts": null,
  "session_id": "sess-f490dd4dbd3c18ed",
  "wallet_status": "active",
  "wallet_uuid": "a4b61956-0c29-4026-9351-092446a7b147"
}
```

每次运行 `caw onboard` 就会创建一个新的 profile 文件夹（避免旧钱包数据丢失）。默认 caw 的操作只对 default\_profile 生效。

可查看钱包 uuid， api key 等信息。

```
cat ~/.cobo-agentic-wallet/profiles/profile_caw_agent_8eb329a19a120ca2/credentials
```

创建 Pact  示例

```
export PATH="$HOME/.cobo-agentic-wallet/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
POLICIES=$(jq -c -n '[{"name":"base-eth-usdc-uniswap-v3-swap","type":"contract_call","rules":{"effect":"allow","when":{"chain_in":["BASE_ETH"],"target_in":[{"chain_id":"BASE_ETH","contract_addr":"0x2626664c2603336E57B271c5C0b26F421741e481"},{"chain_id":"BASE_ETH","contract_addr":"0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000006"},{"chain_id":"BASE_ETH","contract_addr":"0x833589fcd6edb6e08f4c7c32d4f71b54bdA02913"}]},"deny_if":{"usage_limits":{"rolling_24h":{"tx_count_gt":1}}},"always_review":true}}]')
CONDITIONS=$(jq -c -n '[{"type":"tx_count","threshold":"1"}]')
PLAN=$'# ...'
caw pact submit \
  --name "Swap 0.0005 ETH to USDC on Base" \
  --intent "Swap 0.0005 ETH to USDC on Base via Uniswap V3" \
  --original-intent "我已经完成配对了，并且我向 0xfd65955567d69f97d6a0c5985a819a9a220c55f9 充值了 0.001 个 ETH，在 Base 链上。帮我把一半换成 USDC" \
  --recipe-slugs uniswap-v3-swap \
  --policies "$POLICIES" \
  --completion-conditions "$CONDITIONS" \
  --execution-plan "$PLAN" \
  --context '{"chain_id":"BASE_ETH","token_in":"BASE_ETH","token_out":"BASE_USDC","amount_in_eth":"0.0005","amount_out_min_usdc":"0.994208","source":"direct_user_request"}'


{
  "message": "",
  "result": {
    "approval_id": "a0a66ad2-5ed8-4211-a274-7f56a3ab173b",
    "message": "Pact submitted. Awaiting owner approval in CAW App.",
    "pact_id": "66204d5d-2a26-454a-82d2-d8eb2ee7c80f",
    "status": "pending_approval",
    "submitted_spec": {..}
  },
  "success": true,
  ...
}
```

（注：了解完整 Pact Policy 数据格式可参考 [Pact  Policy 说明](https://www.cobo.com/products/agentic-wallet/manual/reference/pact-policies)）

App 批准后，可以使用这个 pact 发起交易（通过 `--pact-id` 参数）

```
export PATH="$HOME/.cobo-agentic-wallet/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
CALLDATA=$(caw util abi encode --method "exactInputSingle((address,address,uint24,address,uint256,uint256,uint160))" --args '[["0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000006","0x833589fcd6edb6e08f4c7c32d4f71b54bda02913","500","0xfd65955567d69f97d6a0c5985a819a9a220c55f9","500000000000000","994208","0"]]' | jq -r .calldata)
caw tx call \
  --pact-id 66204d5d-2a26-454a-82d2-d8eb2ee7c80f \
  --chain-id BASE_ETH \
  --contract 0x2626664c2603336E57B271c5C0b26F421741e481 \
  --calldata "$CALLDATA" \
  --value 0.0005 \
  --src-address 0xfd65955567d69f97d6a0c5985a819a9a220c55f9 \
  --request-id base-eth-usdc-swap-20260601-0001 \
  --description "Swap 0.0005 ETH to USDC on Base via Uniswap V3" \
  --context '{"intent":"swap-half-base-eth-to-usdc","amount_in_eth":"0.0005","amount_out_min_usdc":"0.994208","fee_tier":"500","router":"0x2626664c2603336E57B271c5C0b26F421741e481"}'

{
  "approval_id": "f5039df0-b13d-42ee-a972-3a2100d4be73",
  "id": "e48fa355-dff4-403c-a9f0-2592ce5fe219",
  "idempotent": false,
  "pending_operation_id": "5379140b-5db5-4fdf-a03d-b202167710fe",
  "request_id": "base-eth-usdc-swap-20260601-0001",
  "status": "PendingApproval"
}
```

## API

caw binary 本质就是在调用 API 完成上述所有过程。

因此也可以直接通过 API 完成所有操作。

首先依然需要一个持续运行的 tss node 用于钱包创建和签名。binary 可以在 .cobo-agentic-wallet 的 cache 文件夹或者任意一个 profiles 文件夹中找到。

切换到一个新的文件夹，完成初始化。记下这个 Node ID

```
$ cobo-tss-node init
Type password (at least 16 characters):
Retype password:
INFO[2026-06-01T12:08:12+08:00] Initialize Node ID: coboYtw22v9Z9wdgYVqR3NxpGAYxn7r18rh7oT1TvFgzQis2W
INFO[2026-06-01T12:08:13+08:00] Generate callback public key:
-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
...
-----END PUBLIC KEY-----
INFO[2026-06-01T12:08:13+08:00] Complete initialization of TSS Node keys and data
```

启动 tss node 服务 （注意必须使用 `--caw` 参数）

```
$ cobo-tss-node start --caw
cobo-tss-node
Version: v0.12.20
Build mode: prod
Git commit: bc8f2a77169ab63c2e7a5072e88324b04bab7621
Build time: 20260427T024253

[log] effective inner logger level: info
Type password:
INFO[2026-06-01T12:11:18+08:00] RiskControl final checkerFactory: ....
```

初次启动会提示 `Connection refused, reason: invalid node ID, please bind your TSS Node to application first` ，先忽略即可，等待创建钱包完成。

API 可以通过 curl 或者编写脚本测试。最简单的方式可以直接通过 [https://api-core.agenticwallet.dev.cobo.com/api/v1/docs](https://api-core.agenticwallet.dev.cobo.com/api/v1/docs) 测试

创建初始的 API Key

```
POST /api/v1/principals/provision
{
  "name": "My Agent"
}{
  "success": true,
  "result": {
    "agent_id": "caw_agent_ec3f3be7083f062b",
    "api_key": "caw_...", # 这个 key 要保存好。
    "status": "active",
    "owner_id": null,
    "onboarding_session_id": null
  },
  "suggestion": "",
  "message": "",
  "meta": null
}
```

记下 api key，后续请求填入 `X-API-Key` Header。

```
POST /api/v1/walletsX-API-Key: caw_xxxx
{
  "wallet_type": "MPC",
  "name": "My wallet",
  "group_type": "agent",
  "main_node_id": "coboYtw22v9Z9wdgYVqR3NxpGAYxn7r18rh7oT1TvFgzQis2W",
  "for_owner": false
}{
  "success": true,
  "result": {
    "uuid": "ed262e8f-e46d-4e5a-b537-6c22e9920e26", # 钱包 uuid 
    "wallet_type": "MPC",
    "name": "My wallet",
    "owner_id": "cde4e7d8-3cbc-45a1-955f-010440f6d58e",
    "cobo_wallet_id": null,
    "status": "preparing",
    "metadata": {},
    "created_at": "2026-06-01T04:20:04.571846Z",
    "updated_at": "2026-06-01T04:20:04.571846Z",
    "main_node_id": "coboYtw22v9Z9wdgYVqR3NxpGAYxn7r18rh7oT1TvFgzQis2W"
  },
  "suggestion": "",
  "message": "",
  "meta": null
}
```

查看钱包状态

```
GET /api/v1/wallets{
  "success": true,
  "result": [
    {
      "uuid": "ed262e8f-e46d-4e5a-b537-6c22e9920e26", # 钱包 uuid 
      ...
      "status": "active", # 钱包状态是 active 后可以正常使用了
      ...
    }
  ],
  ...
}
```

创建地址（注意，这里是支持多链同地址的，ETH type 指代所有 EVM 链）

```
POST /api/v1/wallets/ed262e8f-e46d-4e5a-b537-6c22e9920e26/addresses
{
  "chain_type": "ETH"
}

{
  "success": true,
  "result": {
    "wallet_id": "ed262e8f-e46d-4e5a-b537-6c22e9920e26",
    "chain_type": "ETH",
    "compatible_chains": [..
    ],
    "address": "0xec83b17db066b6958a552d04a5d633f8c97cae63",
    "created_at": "2026-06-01T04:24:12.613058Z",
    "updated_at": "2026-06-01T04:24:12.613058Z"
  },
  ...
}
```

发起配对创建配对码

```
POST /api/v1/wallets/pairs/initiate{
  "wallet_id": "ed262e8f-e46d-4e5a-b537-6c22e9920e26"
}

{
  "success": true,
  "result": {
    ...
    "token": "60539484",
    ....
  },
  ...
}
```

依然在手机端填写 token，完成配对。

创建 Pact

```
POST /api/v1/pacts/submit
{
  "wallet_id": "ed262e8f-e46d-4e5a-b537-6c22e9920e26",
  "intent": "intent",
  "original_intent": "original_intent",
  "spec": {
    "policies": [
      {
        "name": "transfer",
        "type": "transfer",
        "rules": {
          "always_review": true
        }
      }
    ],
    "completion_conditions": [
      {
        "type": "time_elapsed",
        "threshold": "10000000"
      }
    ],
    "execution_plan": "execution_plan"
  },
  "name": "Demo pact"
}

{
  "success": true,
  "result": {
    "pact_id": "575166ef-267e-44c7-a856-af577ebcdd95",
    "status": "pending_approval",
    "approval_id": "c815ecea-a6f1-4b5e-98c1-3334b7c6da5c",
    "message": "Pact submitted. Awaiting owner approval in CAW App."
  },
  "suggestion": "",
  "message": "",
  "meta": null
}
```

查看 Pact 状态

```
GET /api/v1/pacts/575166ef-267e-44c7-a856-af577ebcdd95{
  "success": true,
  "result": {
    "id": "575166ef-267e-44c7-a856-af577ebcdd95",
    ...
    "status": "active", # 表示 pact 可用
    "api_key": "caw_xxx", # pact 新生成的 api key
    ...
  },
  ...
}
```

后续想使用这个 Pact 时，必须使用这个 Pact 的 API Key 发起交易。（API 层面无 `--pact-id` 对应的字段，实际是通过 API key 来识别的）

## SDK

SDK 不多介绍了，本质是 API 的封装，大家可以自行查看源码。

Python

* pip install cobo-agentic-wallet  
* [https://github.com/CoboGlobal/cobo-agentic-wallet-python-sdk](https://github.com/CoboGlobal/cobo-agentic-wallet-python-sdk)  
* 除 Open API 封装外，提供了常用 Agent 框架的 Tools 封装

TypeScript

* npm install @cobo/agentic-wallet  
* [https://github.com/CoboGlobal/cobo-agentic-wallet-typescript-sdk](https://github.com/CoboGlobal/cobo-agentic-wallet-typescript-sdk)

# Q & A

问题与讨论

# 小作业

* 通过 Agent \+ Skills 完成任意钱包操作（转账/合约调用/消息签名）  
* 通过 API / SDK 完成任意 DeFi 操作。

[image7]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image8]: <data:image/png;base64,>
